scheme_name: Post-Matric Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
ministry: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities
implementing_agency: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities (DoEPwD)
description: A scholarship scheme for students with disabilities pursuing post-matric education in India from Class 11 onwards, including diploma, undergraduate, and postgraduate courses in recognized institutions.
objective: To support students with disabilities in pursuing higher education and enable them to overcome financial and social barriers to achieve self-reliance and dignified livelihoods.
target_beneficiaries: Students with other disabilities as defined under RPwD Act, 2016

other_conditions: Must not be availing any other government scholarship
Must not be the third sibling receiving this scholarship

exclusions: More than two students from the same family are not eligible (except twins)
Cannot hold any other scholarship or stipend
Repeating a class is not eligible for scholarship
Providing false information will lead to recovery with interest and blacklisting

steps: Register on the National Scholarship Portal
Login and reset password using OTP
Fill the application form and upload documents

documents_required: Bank Account Details of Applicant or Parent/Guardian
